name: PhilateLister stamp catalog
author: Exergy ∞ LLC
description: Entity shard: major stamp catalog or numbering system.

entities.name: catalog_system
entities.brief: A published or customary numbering system (Scott, Michel, etc.).
entities.description: Reference system used for catalog numbers on individual stamps; one row per system you track. Primary key is the conventional abbreviation (Mi, Sc, …).

field_definitions.name: catalog_system_abbreviation
field_definitions.description: Short label shown in UI or listings; extend the enum when adding catalog_system rows.

fields.name: catalog_system_abbreviation
fields.description: Stable abbreviation for this catalog (primary key; e.g. Sc, Mi, Facit).

fields.name: name
fields.description: Full name of the catalog or reference work.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Edition notes, regional scope, or usage caveats.
